# Copilot Package Docs Base

This `.github/docs/` folder is the required documentation base for this standalone GitHub Copilot package.

Update it after every feature, fix, migration, architecture change, security change, operational change, or setup change to the package.

Start with:

- [Project Docs Base](project-docs-base.md)
- [Project Changelog](project-changelog.md)
- [Feature Delivery Log](feature-delivery-log.md)

## Rule

No package change is complete until implementation, verification, line review, and docs base update are recorded or explicitly marked not applicable with reason.
